basicInfo.title: Create your account
basicInfo.phoneUnavailableMessage: Phone number registration is not available yet. Please use your email to create an account.

errors.emailTaken: This email is already associated with an account. Try signing in.
errors.phoneTaken: This phone number is already associated with an account. Try signing in.
errors.networkError: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
errors.unknownError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

dateOfBirth.subtitle: You must be at least 18 years old to use ATTO SOUND

profileSetup.usernameHint: Letters, numbers, dots, and underscores. 3-30 chars.
profileSetup.repQuestion: Will you represent a creator on ATTO SOUND?
profileSetup.repDescription: You are creating this account on behalf of a creator and have their permission to manage and publish their content.
profileSetup.noForMe: No, this account is for me

creatorInmate.title: Verify your identity
creatorInmate.subtitle: Enter your inmate number so we can verify your identity and set up your creator profile.

creatorAccountSetup.title: Set up the creator account
creatorAccountSetup.subtitle: Create login credentials for the creator
creatorAccountSetup.phoneTaken: This phone number is already registered
creatorAccountSetup.passwordSubtitle: This password will be used to log in to the creator account
creatorAccountSetup.profileSubtitle: Set up how the creator appears on ATTO SOUND

howItWorks.title: How creator representation works
howItWorks.paragraph:
As a representative, you will manage this account on behalf of the creator.
You will be responsible for publishing content, managing interactions, and handling communications related to the creator's profile.
bullets: You act on behalf of the creator
You must have their explicit consent
All actions are logged for transparency
The creator can revoke representation at any time

consentForm.title: Creator consent is required
consentForm.consentCheckbox: I understand and agree that all <bold>consent verification</bold> calls will be recorded for legal and security purposes.
consentForm.lookupFailed: Inmate not found. Please check the number and try again.

whatHappensNext.title: What happens next?
whatHappensNext.verifyConsentParagraph: We will contact the creator directly to verify their consent for you to act as their representative. This is a crucial step to ensure the creator's rights and wishes are respected.
whatHappensNext.howCallsWorkParagraph: All consent verification calls are automatically recorded for legal compliance and your protection. These recordings serve as official documentation of the creator's approval.
callFeatures: Securely stored in a dedicated folder within your profile
Available for you to listen, download or post them to at any time
whatHappensNext.recordingsPrivate: These recordings are private and accessible <bold>only from your account</bold>.

subscription.title: Choose Your Plan
subscription.subtitle: Unlock features that match your goals.
subscription.disclaimer: Cancel anytime. Subscription renews automatically unless canceled before renewal.

bridgeNumber.title: Your Bridge Number
bridgeNumber.subtitle: This is your unique number for connecting with the creator. Share it securely.
bridgeNumber.purchaseFailed: We could not purchase your number. Please try again later.
bridgeNumber.shareMessage:
Your ATTO Bridge Number: {{number}}

Use this number to connect with your creator.
bridgeNumber.contactPermissionMessage: Allow access to Contacts to save the bridge number.
bridgeNumber.noteSecure: Keep this number secure. The creator will need it to verify and establish the connection.
bridgeNumber.noteOtp: An OTP will be sent to the inmate to verify your representation before the bridge call can be established.

creatorGenres.title: What genres?
creatorGenres.subtitle: Select the genres that define the creator
